name: Al-Shifa Hospital Complex
detail: IDF raided Al-Shifa Hospital on 15 November 2023, claiming Hamas command infrastructure. Tunnel shafts and weapons cache found; scale of command center disputed. Hospital rendered non-functional. Second raid March 2024 killed hundreds of militants.

name: Hamas Leadership Elimination Campaign
detail: IDF systematically eliminated Hamas leadership: Mohammed Deif (presumed Aug 2024), Yahya Sinwar (Oct 16, 2024), Ismail Haniyeh (Tehran, Jul 31, 2024 — attributed to Mossad). Marwan Issa (deputy Qassam commander) killed Mar 2024. Senior PIJ commanders also targeted.

name: Hamas Tunnel Network Destruction
detail: IDF declared goal to destroy Hamas's ~500km tunnel network. Used 2,000-lb bunker busters, controlled flooding (seawater pumps), and underground demolition. Estimated 30–50% of tunnels destroyed by 2024. Tunnel discoveries continued to reveal Hamas's extensive infrastructure.

name: Philadelphi Corridor Seizure
detail: IDF seized the 14km Philadelphi Corridor along Gaza-Egypt border in May 2024, cutting Hamas weapons smuggling route. Egyptian government protested Israeli presence near border. Corridor's status was the main obstacle in Phase 2 ceasefire negotiations — Netanyahu insisted on Israeli control, Hamas demanded full withdrawal.

name: Iran Direct Attack on Israel (April 13, 2024)
detail: Iran launched its first-ever direct attack on Israeli territory: 300+ drones, cruise missiles, and ballistic missiles. Israel, US, UK, France, and Jordan intercepted 99% of projectiles. Israel and partners' coordinated defense was unprecedented. Minor damage to Nevatim Air Base. Israel conducted limited retaliatory strike on Isfahan (Apr 19).

name: Hezbollah Northern Front (Oct 2023–Sep 2024)
detail: Hezbollah opened a 'support front' for Hamas from day one of the war, firing anti-tank missiles, rockets, and drones into northern Israel daily. ~60,000 Israelis evacuated from northern Israel. Israel-Hezbollah full war erupted September 2024; IDF killed Hezbollah Secretary-General Hassan Nasrallah (Sep 27, 2024) and launched ground operation in south Lebanon.

name: Houthi Attacks on Shipping / Israeli-Linked Vessels
detail: Yemen's Houthi movement fired missiles and drones at Israeli-linked shipping in the Red Sea beginning November 2023, claiming solidarity with Gaza. ~100+ vessels attacked. US-led Operation Prosperity Guardian conducted strikes on Houthi positions in Yemen. Suez Canal traffic fell ~50%; global shipping costs surged. Houthis also launched ballistic missiles at Israel (mostly intercepted).
